sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n18360" key="a)filo/logos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀφῐλό-λογος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n18360.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">without love for learning lilerature,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.673a</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
